description: Raw REST pass-through. Execute any Fabric REST API call directly. Supports GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE, @file body, stdin piping, and --api powerbi for Power BI REST API.
notes: Use --body for inline JSON, --body @file.json for file, --body @- for stdin. Use --poll for LRO endpoints. Use --api powerbi to route to https://api.powerbi.com/v1.0/myorg. Use --query-params 'key=value' for URL parameters. Dry-run supported for mutating methods (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE).

query_examples.description: Extract item names from list response.
